page: Microsoft Azure E32s_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the ESv5 server family. It is built on the x86_64 architecture and powered by an Intel Xeon 8370C processor running at 2.8 GHz. The server features 32 dedicated vCPUs derived from 16 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled, resulting in 2 threads per core. It is equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. This instance does not include local storage or bundled GPUs, but it is Premium Storage capable, allowing connection to high-performance external storage volumes.

In benchmark evaluations, the E32s_v5 demonstrates solid mid-tier performance across compute and memory subsystems. The Passmark memory score and Geekbench image processing benchmarks both rank in the top 25 percent, reflecting efficient memory throughput and data handling. Large-block uncached memory read bandwidth reaches 150.25 GB/sec, while write bandwidth is measured at 67.0 GB/sec. For compute tasks, the server achieved a Passmark CPU score of 36,843.62 and a multi-core Geekbench score of 14,331.0, both placing in the middle 50 percent tier.

The high memory density makes the E32s_v5 highly suitable for memory-intensive workloads such as relational databases, in-memory caching systems, and enterprise applications. Redis SET operations reached 31.36 million operations per second, and Passmark database operations scored 15,312.74, confirming its suitability for transactional systems. While it performs strongly in processing smaller language models, achieving 2,294.72 tokens per second for prompt processing on a 135M parameter model, it exhibits weak performance on larger models due to the lack of dedicated GPU acceleration.
description: Microsoft Azure E32s_v5 is an x86_64 memory-optimized virtual machine from the ESv5 family, featuring 32 dedicated vCPUs and 256.0 GB of RAM. Powered by an Intel Xeon 8370C processor at 2.8 GHz, it offers a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. While it lacks local storage and GPU accelerators, it is Premium Storage capable, making it highly compatible with external high-performance storage. Benchmarks show strong performance in memory-bound operations, with a top-tier Passmark memory score and high image processing capabilities. Conversely, compute-heavy tasks and large-scale LLM inference fall into average or weak tiers due to the absence of hardware acceleration. This server is best suited for memory-intensive workloads, including relational databases, in-memory caching, and enterprise application hosting.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E32s_v5 is an x86_64 memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs and 256 GB of RAM, designed for memory-intensive database and enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E32s_v5 is a memory-optimized VM with 32 Intel Xeon vCPUs and 256 GB RAM, ideal for databases and memory-intensive workloads.
tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring high RAM density and dedicated Intel Xeon processors for demanding database and enterprise applications.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated vCPUs and 256.0 GB of RAM providing 8.0 GB per core
Powered by an Intel Xeon 8370C processor running at 2.8 GHz
Premium Storage capable with no local storage or bundled GPUs
Strong performance in memory bandwidth and image processing benchmarks
Optimized for relational databases, in-memory caching, and enterprise workloads
